page_content:
## Updated Final Email Drafts  
### 1. Dr. Fateme Esmailie (The Personable Leader)  
**Subject:** Medical School Application Update: Arian Moridani (Senior Design Lead)  
Hi Dr. Esmailie,  
I hope you’re having a great start to 2026—and that your cats are still getting all the treats they deserve!  
Since I led our **Aortic Valve Model** team under your guidance, where we developed an in-house model of human vasculature while reducing procurement costs to **under $500**, I have been diving deeper into the technical side of healthcare. Your **Biomedical Modeling** course gave me my first taste of clinical-scale engineering and provided the foundation for my current work toward an **M.S. in Computer Science (AI)** at **Georgia Tech**.  
I’m applying to medical school this cycle and would be honored if you could update your letter of recommendation. I’m using **Interfolio** for a single, seamless upload. **Would you be able to submit your letter by May 15th?**  
I’ve attached my updated CV and a project summary to reflect my journey since graduation. Thank you for being such an important part of my path.  
Warmly,  
Arian Moridani  
---
